markets.question: Raptors vs. Pelicans: O/U 233.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Raptors and Pelicans combine to score 234 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 234, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Raptors vs. Pelicans
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Raptors win, the market will resolve to "Raptors".
If the Pelicans win, the market will resolve to "Pelicans".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Will MrBeast's next video get less than 62 million views on day 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of views the latest YouTube video posted by MrBeast gets in the first 120 hours after being posted. This market may not resolve until the 120 hours are complete, regardless of whether a strike is reached earlier.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source for this market is MrBeast's YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/@MrBeast), specifically the 'views' counter for the described video.

Note: This market refers to the video titled "Survive 30 Days Stranded With Your Ex, Win $250,000", which can be found here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AoN1K4c7VKE. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

markets.question: Spread: Sabres (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for March 12 at 7:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Sabres" if the Sabres win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Capitals".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Capitals vs. Sabres
events.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for March 12 at 7:00PM ET:
If the Capitals win, the market will resolve to "Capitals".
If the Sabres win, the market will resolve to "Sabres".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.
